temporal_description: (00:00-00:05) A young boy with shaggy brown hair, seen from behind, stands in a dimly lit room. He wears a striped sweater vest over a collared shirt. He holds a large, sharp kitchen knife in his right hand, pointing it forward as he cautiously approaches a closed, paneled door. The room is furnished with a bedside lamp on a small table to his left and a bookshelf to his right. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a tense and ominous mood, introducing a young boy armed with a knife, suggesting he is either hunting something or being hunted.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A high-pitched, eerie, and suspenseful musical score plays, punctuated by a low, guttural growl.)
